<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Material+Symbols+Outlined:wght,FILL@100..700,0..1&display=swap" rel="stylesheet"/>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Material+Symbols+Outlined:wght,FILL@100..700,0..1&display=swap" rel="stylesheet"/>
<script id="tailwind-config">
        tailwind.config = {
            darkMode: "class",
            theme: {
                extend: {
                    colors: {
                        "outline": "#6e7779",
                        "on-secondary": "#004755",
                        "surface": "#0b0f10",
                        "on-secondary-fixed-variant": "#006577",
                        "on-surface-variant": "#a4adaf",
                        "background": "#0b0f10",
                        "tertiary-fixed-dim": "#acd5e9",
                        "outline-variant": "#41494b",
                        "surface-container-high": "#1a2122",
                        "on-primary-fixed": "#000000",
                        "on-primary-container": "#001429",
                        "surface-container-lowest": "#000000",
                        "surface-dim": "#0b0f10",
                        "on-secondary-container": "#0ad1f5",
                        "inverse-primary": "#0062a6",
                        "on-background": "#dee7e9",
                        "secondary-fixed-dim": "#78e3ff",
                        "on-error": "#490006",
                        "inverse-surface": "#f7fafb",
                        "on-primary-fixed-variant": "#00203c",
                        "secondary-dim": "#00caed",
                        "tertiary-dim": "#acd5e9",
                        "surface-container-low": "#0f1416",
                        "surface-bright": "#252d30",
                        "tertiary-fixed": "#bae3f8",
                        "inverse-on-surface": "#525657",
                        "on-error-container": "#ff9993",
                        "on-tertiary-fixed": "#154051",
                        "error-container": "#871f21",
                        "on-secondary-fixed": "#004653",
                        "primary": "#9fcaff",
                        "on-tertiary-fixed-variant": "#355d6e",
                        "primary-container": "#0097fc",
                        "surface-container": "#141b1c",
                        "on-primary": "#004273",
                        "on-surface": "#dee7e9",
                        "error-dim": "#c54d4a",
                        "primary-fixed-dim": "#008ae7",
                        "surface-variant": "#1f2729",
                        "tertiary-container": "#bae3f8",
                        "surface-container-highest": "#1f2729",
                        "on-tertiary-container": "#2b5364",
                        "secondary-fixed": "#aeecff",
                        "tertiary": "#d2efff",
                        "error": "#fa746f",
                        "secondary-container": "#00424e",
                        "primary-dim": "#3da2ff",
                        "on-tertiary": "#345c6d",
                        "surface-tint": "#9fcaff",
                        "primary-fixed": "#0097fc",
                        "secondary": "#25d8fc"
                    },
                    fontFamily: {
                        "headline": ["Manrope"],
                        "body": ["Inter"],
                        "label": ["Inter"]
                    },
                    borderRadius: {"DEFAULT": "0.25rem", "lg": "0.5rem", "xl": "0.75rem", "full": "9999px"},
                },
            },
        }
    </script>
<style>
        .glass-card {
            background: rgba(31, 39, 41, 0.5);
            backdrop-filter: blur(20px);
            border: 1px solid rgba(65, 73, 75, 0.2);
        }
        .glow-cyan {
            box-shadow: 0 0 20px rgba(37, 216, 252, 0.15);
        }
        .text-gradient {
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #9fcaff 0%, #25d8fc 100%);
            -webkit-background-clip: text;
            -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent;
        }
        .btn-primary {
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #9fcaff 0%, #25d8fc 100%);
            transition: all 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1);
        }
        .btn-primary:hover {
            transform: scale(1.02);
            filter: brightness(1.1);
        }
        details > summary { list-style: none; }
        details > summary::-webkit-details-marker { display: none; }
    </style>
